title: Result missmatched with vcs
code_blocks:
What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
5.034 compiled with clang-18 

What OS and distribution are you using?
ubuntu20.04

May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
Sure , but we need clarify reason first. 



After executing the simple bench below, the waveform data obtained shows inconsistencies between the results calculated by Verilator and VCS. According to common understanding, both Verilator and VCS comply with the IEEE Verilog standard. However, in actual simulations, they produce different waveform outputs, which is quite puzzling. What is the reason for this discrepancy? Or, how can such differences be avoided?

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/06ba270d-ab92-4669-9ecc-6546b3770298)
